creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
I tried the trendy ramen restaurant in Copenhagen, and all I can think about is that I paid 73dkk ($10.5) for a tiny beer 😐

📍Ramen to Biiru, Copenhagen #ramen #copenhagenfood

transcription.text: Why do people insist on this place being the best ramen restaurant in Copenhagen? Ramen to Biro is a chain restaurant run by a Danish brewery called Mikkeller and the restaurant has a lot of gimmicks that I'm sure you'll enjoy if you're a hipster still stuck in 2012. I suppose 150 Danish crowns for a bowl of soup is just about what you can expect to pay in this day and age but 73 crowns for a tiny IPA is such a f***ing joke. The spicy miso ramen was decent but nothing special so I left with the sneaky feeling that people only rave about this place because it's run by a brewery that used to be cool 10 years ago.
